name: वेदव्यास
description: Author of the Mahabharata, compiler of the Vedas, and narrator of the Puranas.

name: वाल्मीकि
description: Author of the Ramayana, the first Sanskrit epic poem. Known as the Adi Kavi.

name: तुलसीदास
description: Author of Ramcharitmanas, one of the greatest works in Hindi literature.

name: आदि शङ्कराचार्य
description: Philosopher and theologian who consolidated the doctrine of Advaita Vedanta.

name: सूरदास
description: Blind poet and singer, known for his devotional songs dedicated to Lord Krishna.

name: अज्ञात
description: Author unknown or traditionally attributed to divine revelation (Shruti).

name: संत तुकाराम
description: One of the greatest Varkari saints and poets of Maharashtra. His Abhangas are treasures of Marathi devotional literature.

name: संत ज्ञानेश्वर
description: Author of Dnyaneshwari (commentary on Bhagavad Gita in Marathi) and Amritanubhav. Pioneer of Marathi literature.

name: संत नामदेव
description: Varkari saint whose Abhangas transcended regional boundaries. His verses appear in the Sikh Guru Granth Sahib as well.

name: संत एकनाथ
description: Varkari saint, scholar, and social reformer. Edited Dnyaneshwari and composed Bharuds and Abhangas.

name: संत रामदास
description: Author of Dasbodh and Manache Shlok. Spiritual guru of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.

name: संत कबीर
description: Mystic poet and saint whose Dohas and verses transcend religious boundaries, emphasizing inner devotion over rituals.
